name: I Tripped
instructions: 1. Fast food tüketiminin arttığı günümüzde bakliyat ile yapılan yemeklere öğünlerde sık sık yer vermeli.
2.  Pirinç ile bulguru tencereye alın.
3.  Üzerine et suyunu ilave edin.
4.  Tuzu ekleyip orta ateşte pişirin.
5.  Yeşil mercimeği başka bir tencerede haşlayın.
6.  Kara suyunu döküp, bulgurlu pirince ilave edin.
7.  Pilav pişip suyunu çekince, tavada kızdırdığınız tereyağını üzerine gezdirin.
8.  Servis yapın.

name: I Was Fucking

ingredients.item: 1 συσκ.μικρά αποφλοιωμένα ντοματίνια σε χυμό ντομάτας
1 συσκ.μικρά αποφλοιωμένα ντοματίνια σε χυμό ντομάτας

instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε σε ένα τηγάνι και σε μέτρια φωτιά το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε το σκόρδο για 1/2 λεπτό, να μην πάρει χρώμα.
Ρίχνουμε τις αντζούγιες, τις ελιές, την κάππαρη και το μπούκοβο και τα σοτάρουμε για 1–2 λεπτά πιέζοντας τις αντζούγιες να λιώσουν.
Προσθέτουμε τα ντοματίνια με το χυμό τους και σιγοβράζουμε για 5–6 λεπτά, να δέσει η σάλτσα. Τέλος πασπαλίζουμε με πολύ ψιλοκομμένο μαϊντανό και διορθώνουμε τη γεύση με αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Παράλληλα βράζουμε τα σπαγγέτι σε άφθονο αλατισμένο νερό για 2 λεπτά λιγότερο από το χρόνο που προτείνει η συσκευασία τους.
Με μια τσιμπίδα, τα ρίχνουμε, έτσι όπως στάζουν, στο τηγάνι με τη σάλτσα ανακατεύοντας με κυκλικές κινήσεις.
Σερβίρουμε την πουτανέσκα αμέσως ραντίζοντας κάθε μερίδα με λίγες σταγόνες αγουρέλαιο.

name: Ibizan Flaó

ingredients.item: 20 g de manteca de cerdo a temperatura ambiente
600 g de requesón o queso fresco
Hierbabuena fresca (cantidad al gusto, finamente picada)

instructions: En un bol grande, agrega 250 g de harina de repostería. Añade 20 g de manteca de cerdo a temperatura ambiente para darle una textura rica y sabrosa a la masa. Rompe un huevo y agrégalo al bol junto con la harina y la manteca de cerdo. El huevo proporcionará la humedad necesaria y ayudará a unir la masa. Añade 2 cucharaditas de licor de anís, lo que le dará ese característico sabor anisado al Flaó. Además, agrega la ralladura de 1 limón para un toque de frescura y aroma. Incorpora 35 g de azúcar para darle un toque dulce a la masa. Añade también una pizca de sal para equilibrar los sabores. Si deseas intensificar el sabor a anís, agrega semillas de anís al gusto. Puedes ajustar la cantidad según tu preferencia personal. Comienza a mezclar todos los ingredientes con una cuchara o tenedor hasta que se integren un poco. Luego, comienza a amasar la masa con las manos. Amasa hasta que todos los ingredientes estén completamente incorporados y obtengas una masa suave y homogénea. Si la masa está demasiado pegajosa, puedes añadir un poco más de harina, pero hazlo gradualmente para no excederte. Una vez que tengas una masa uniforme, envuelve en film transparente para evitar que se seque y déjala reposar en el frigorifico durante al menos 30 minutos. Esto ayudará a que la masa sea más fácil de manejar cuando la estires en el molde.
Precalienta tu horno a 180ºC. Estira la masa más grande y forra un molde para tarta, asegurándote de cubrir fondo y lados.

En otro recipiente, bate 4 huevos y 220 gramos de azúcar hasta obtener una mezcla cremosa. Añade 600 gramos de requesón o queso fresco y mezcla bien. Agrega hierbabuena fresca picada al gusto para darle un toque especial. Vierte la mezcla de queso sobre la masa. Añade algunas hojas de hierbabuena por encima.
Hornea durante unos 45 minutos hasta que esté dorado y el relleno esté firme.
Deja enfriar y luego corta en porciones para servir este postre tradicional de Ibiza. ¡Disfruta de tu Flaó casero!

name: Ice Cream
instructions: Με μίξερ χειρός χτυπάμε για 5΄ τη φυτική σαντιγί να αφρατέψει καλά και να φουσκώσει.
Λίγο λίγο και πάντα χτυπώντας με το μίξερ, προσθέτουμε το ζαχαρούχο γάλα.
Τώρα το μείγμα μας έχει γίνει μια παχιά κρέμα.
Σιγά σιγά προσθέτουμε το εβαπορέ, χαμηλώνοντας την ταχύτητα του μίξερ, γιατί το μείγμα αραιώνει και πιτσιλάει.
Τέλος, προσθέτουμε τη βανίλια.
Παγώνουμε το παγωτό για περίπου 1 ώρα, μέχρι να αρχίσει να πήζει.
Το ξαναχτυπάμε με το μίξερ χειρός, να αφρατέψει καλά, για 5′, σε δυνατή ταχύτητα.
Παγώνουμε στην κατάψυξη και είναι έτοιμο.

name: Ice Cream And Fruit Crepe
instructions: 1. Krep için, un ve yumurtayı bir cam kaseye alıp mikserle çırpın.
2.  Şeker ve sütü ekleyip pürüzsüz bir karışım elde edene kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
3.  Krep tavasını ayçiçek yağıyla yağlayıp tavaya bir kepçe dolusu krep harcından dökün.
4.  Tavayı hafifçe sallayıp hamurun tavaya eşit olarak yayılmasını sağlayın.
5.  Hamurun her iki yüzünü pişirin.
6.  Tüm hamuru bu şekilde hazırlayın.
7.  Kreplerin üzerine dondurma, yaban mersini, çilek, böğürtlen ve frambuaz ekleyip servis yapın.

name: Ice Cream Cake
instructions: Φτιάχνουμε πρώτα τη βάση μπισκότου.
Βάζουμε σε μία κατσαρόλα το βούτυρο να λιώσει σε χαμηλή φωτιά, προσθέτουμε το κακάο κοσκινισμένο και το ζαχαρούχο γάλα.
Ανακατεύουμε τα υλικά και τα αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε τα μπισκότα θρυμματισμένα και το κονιάκ και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Στρώνουμε το μείγμα σε φόρμα δαχτυλίδι 26 ή 28 εκ. (μεγάλη).
Παγώνουμε τη φόρμα στην κατάψυξη.

name: Ice Cream Cake With 3 Ingredients
instructions: Στρώνουμε μεμβράνη σε μια στρογγυλή φόρμα με διάμετρο 20-22 εκ.
Θέλουμε να καλυφθεί τόσο η βάση όσο και τα τοιχώματα.
Τοποθετούμε την φόρμα στην κατάψυξη μέχρι να κάνουμε την κρέμα
Σε ένα παγωμένο μπολ ρίχνουμε την κρύα κρέμα γάλακτος μαζί με την πραλίνα φουντουκιού .
Χτυπάμε με το μίξερ σε δυνατή ταχύτητα το μείγμα για μερικά λεπτά μέχρι να αρχίσει να γίνεται μια ωραία βελούδινη και παχύρρευστη κρέμα.
Βγάζουμε από την κατάψυξη την φόρμα και ρίχνουμε την μισή ποσότητα κρέμας σε όλη την επιφάνεια.
Την στρώνουμε με ένα κουτάλι ώστε να είναι ίσια η επιφάνεια της.
Σπάμε μερικά μπισκότα με σοκολάτα γάλακτος σε όλη την επιφάνεια της κρέμας.
Καλύπτουμε με την υπόλοιπη κρέμα και με ένα κουτάλι η με μια σπάτουλα απλώνουμε ώστε να είναι λεία η επιφάνεια.
Κάνουμε μια τελευταία στρώση από μπισκότα χωρίς να τα σπάσουμε πάρα μόνο για τα μικρά κενά που δημιουργούνται.
Καλύπτουμε με μεμβράνη την τούρτα παγωτό και αφήνουμε στην κατάψυξη για λίγες ώρες να παγώσει και να σφίξει καλά
Βγάζουμε από την κατάψυξη την τούρτα παγωτό για 5 με 10 λεπτά  πριν σερβίρουμε ώστε να μπορέσουμε να την κόψουμε σε κομμάτια.
Σερβίρουμε και γαρνίρουμε με πραλίνα φουντουκιού και σπασμένα μπισκότα ή ξηρούς καρπούς, είναι συγκλονιστικά νόστιμη και εύκολη.

name: Ice Cream Cake With Caramel Sauce
instructions: 1. Dondurmayı 30 dakika oda sıcaklığında bekletin.
2.  Pasta tabanını 20 cm'lik pasta çemberinin tabanına yerleştirin.
3.  Süt ile ıslatın.
4.  Yumuşayan dondurmayı üzerine doldurun.
5.  1 gece derin dondurucuda bekletin.
6.  Şekeri yapışmaz yüzeyli tavaya alın ve orta ateşte karıştırmadan erimeye bırakın.
7.  Tereyağı ekleyip erimesini bekleyin.
8.  Kremayı ilave edin ve koyulaşıncaya kadar karıştırarak pişirin.
9.  Soğuduktan sonra pastanın üzerine sosu gezdirin.
10.  File badem, böğürtlen ve nane yaprağı ile süsleyip servis yapın.

name: Ice Cream Cake With Cookies
instructions: Λιώνουμε τη μαργαρίνη και την αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Τρίβουμε στο μίξερ τα σοκολατένια μπισκότα.
Ρίχνουμε τη μαργαρίνη που έχει κρυώσει στα τριμμένα μπισκότα κι ανακατεύουμε μέχρι να βραχούν καλά.
Με την ανάποδη του κουταλιού στρώνουμε το μείγμα στη βάση της φόρμας δαχτυλίδι ή τσέρκι.
Με σοκολάτα πραλίνα φουντουκιού, κολλάμε στη βάση της φόρμας, (πάνω στο μείγμα) μπισκότα, ανοιγμένα στη μέση, με σχέδιο (εναλλάξ κρέμα-σκέτο).

name: Ice Cream Cold Coffee Affogato Recipe

ingredients.item: Vanilyalı dondurma yerine çikolatalı, karamelli, fındıklı veya meyveli dondurma kullanabilirsiniz.
Vegan veya düşük kalorili bir seçenek için sorbe, hindistancevizi kremalı dondurma, badem sütü veya yulaf sütü bazlı dondurma tercih edebilirsiniz.
Espresso yerine sert filtre kahve, ristretto, americano veya soğuk demleme kahve kullanabilirsiniz.
Kahveyi aromalı yapmak için vanilya, karamel veya fındık şurubu ekleyebilirsiniz.
Dondurma veya kahve üzerine rendelenmiş bitter çikolata, kakao tozu, tarçın veya karamel sos serpebilirsiniz.
Fındık, badem, ceviz veya granola ile kıtır dokusu ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Servis bardaklarına dondurmaları yerleştirin.
2.  Üzerlerine taze hazırlanmış sıcak espresso’yu dökün ve servis yapın.

name: Ice Cream Cone Recipe

ingredients.item: Muz püresi (yarım olgun muz = 1 yumurta yerine) → hafif tatlı ve bağlayıcı
Hindistan cevizi yağı tatlıya tropikal aroma katar
Hamura kakao veya tarçın ekleyerek farklı lezzetlerde külahlar yapabilirsiniz.
Şeker miktarını azaltıp daha az tatlı bir külah elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta yumurta ve şekeri çırpın.
2. Süt, eritilmiş tereyağı ve vanilyayı ekleyip karıştırın.
3. Un ve tuzu eleyerek ekleyin ve pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edin.
4. Yapışmaz bir tavayı hafifçe ısıtın.
5. 2–3 yemek kaşığı hamuru tavaya dökün ve ince bir daire şeklinde yayın.
6. Orta ateşte altı hafifçe kızarana kadar pişirin, sonra ters çevirin ve diğer tarafını 10–15 saniye pişirin.
7. Sıcak hamuru tavadan alın ve hemen bir külah kalıbına veya koni şekli verecek şekilde rulo yapın.
8. Soğuyup sertleşene kadar bekletin.
9. Külahlar tamamen soğuduktan sonra içine dondurma veya krema doldurup servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Ice Cream Cookie
instructions: Βάζουμε πρώτα στο μπλέντερ τα μισά  μπισκότα.
Τα αλέθουμε σε σκόνη.
Προσθέτουμε το γάλα και συνεχίζουμε το χτύπημα.
Στη συνέχεια προσθέτουμε την κρέμα γάλακτος, την ζάχαρη, το αλάτι και την βανίλια.
Συνεχίζουμε να αλέθουμε όλα τα υλικά μαζί για 2′ λεπτά ακόμα.
Αν έχουμε παγωτομηχανή βάζουμε το μίγμα  και ακολουθούμε τις οδηγίες για να γίνει το παγωτό.
Σπάμε τα υπόλοιπα μπισκότα σε μικρά κομμάτια ή μικρές μπουκίτσες.
Αν δεν έχουμε παγωτομηχανή, αδειάζουμε το μίγμα σε μπολ και το βάζουμε στην κατάψυξη για 2′ να αρχίσει να σφίγγει.
Τότε το παίρνουμε και το χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός να αφρατέψει καλά.
Ξαναπαγώνουμε για 30′ και το ξαναχτυπάμε.
Όταν  έχει αρχίσει να πήζει προσθέτουμε τα υπόλοιπα σπασμένα μπισκότα.
Το παγώνουμε  στην κατάψυξη.
Σερβίρουμε με σπασμένα κομματάκια μπισκότου.

name: Ice Cream Dessert
instructions: Crush all but 10 of the cookies. Combine crushed cookies in large bowl with 1/2 cup melted butter and peanuts.
Press mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish and freeze until cold.
Spread softened ice cream over cold crust and freeze until set.
Combine confectioners' sugar, evaporated milk, chocolate chips, 1/2 cup butter and vanilla in large saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat. Boil for 7 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and cool completely; pour mixture over ice cream and freeze until set.

name: Ice Cream Fig
instructions: Βάζουμε τα αποξηραμένα σύκα στον κάδο του μίξερ με κόφτες και τα ψιλοκόβουμε.
Προσθέτουμε το ανθότυρο, το λικέρ και το μέλι. Πολτοποιούμε μέχρι να έχουμε ένα λείο μείγμα.
Ρίχνουμε το γάλα και χτυπάμε ξανά, μέχρι να ενσωματωθούν όλα τα υλικά.
Μεταφέρουμε το μείγμα σε κατάλληλο δοχείο και το τοποθετούμε στην κατάψυξη για 1–2 ώρες, μέχρι να αρχίσει να σφίγγει.
Βγάζουμε το μείγμα και το χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός, σε δυνατή ταχύτητα, για 3–4 λεπτά, μέχρι να αφρατέψει και να αποκτήσει όγκο. Το μείγμα μετατρέπεται ξανά σε κρέμα.
Ξαναβάζουμε το παγωτό στην κατάψυξη και το αφήνουμε μέχρι να παγώσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί πλήρως.
Σερβίρουμε με μέλι και φρέσκα σύκα , αν είναι η εποχή τους.

name: Ice Cream From Paros
instructions: Για να φτιάξουμε το παγωτό με φρέσκια μυζήθρα, ξεπαγώνουμε πρώτα το παγωτό για 10΄ σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Απλώνουμε τα αμύγδαλα σε ταψάκι και τα ψήνουμε στο φούρνο στους 180°C για 10΄, να ροδίσουν ελαφρά.
Τα αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.
Παγώνουμε στην κατάψυξη μεταλλικό μπολ παγωτού για 10΄-15΄.
Βάζουμε τη μυζήθρα σε ένα μίξερ με κάδο και την αλέθουμε με τους κόφτες.
Προσθέτουμε το μέλι και χτυπάμε για 1΄, να γίνουν κρέμα.
Ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλι το παγωτό που έχει ελαφρά μαλακώσει αλλά όχι λιώσει.
Προσθέτουμε το μείγμα ανθότυρου-μελιού.
Ανακατεύουμε με κουτάλι, να ενωθούν τα δύο μείγματα.
Παγώνουμε το παγωτό για 1 ώρα και 30΄, να σφίξει.
Σερβίρουμε μπάλες παγωτό σε ποτήρι, πασπαλίζουμε με αμύγδαλα και περιχύνουμε με λίγο μέλι, ή με γλυκό του κουταλιού .

name: Ice Cream Lasagna
instructions: Line the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan with 12 ice cream sandwiches.

Open the jar of peanut butter, place into microwave oven and microwave on low power for about 30 seconds at a time, until peanut butter is warm and spreads easily. Spread half the peanut butter over the layer of ice cream sandwiches.
Mix instant chocolate pudding mix into whipped topping; spread half the mixture over peanut butter layer.
Spread half the peanut butter cups over whipped topping layer.

Remove tops of hot fudge and caramel topping jars and microwave on low power for about 10 seconds at a time, just until toppings are warmed and liquid. Drizzle half of the fudge and caramel sauces over peanut butter cups.
Repeat layers, starting with remaining ice cream sandwiches, followed by remaining peanut butter, whipped topping mix, peanut butter cups, hot fudge sauce, and caramel sauce.
Freeze dessert until solidly frozen, 1 to 2 hours.

name: Ice Cream Melon Bowl Recipe

ingredients.item: Küçük kavun yerine bal kabak, mango veya ananas da kullanabilirsiniz; bu meyveler de doğal bir kase görevi görür.
Kavun yerine dilimlenmiş karpuz veya kavun topu şeklinde çıkarılmış kavun kullanmak da görsellik açısından hoş olur.
Vanilya, çilek ve mango yerine çikolatalı, fıstıklı, karamel veya meyveli dondurma çeşitleri kullanabilirsiniz.
Vegan dondurma veya sorbe alternatifleri ile daha hafif ve süt ürünü içermeyen bir seçenek yaratabilirsiniz.
Yaban mersini ve ahududu yerine çilek, böğürtlen, kivi veya taze nane ile birlikte nar taneleri de ekleyebilirsiniz.
Meyve yerine küçük granola parçaları, kuru meyve veya fındık-fıstık kırıkları ile doku ve lezzet zenginliği sağlayabilirsiniz.
Taze nane yerine fesleğen veya limon kabuğu rendesi kullanabilirsiniz.
üzerine az miktarda bal veya akçaağaç şurubu gezdirerek ekstra tatlılık ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Kavunu ortadan ikiye kesin ve çekirdeklerini temizleyin.
2.  Kavunun içinden bir dondurma kaşığı veya küçük kaşık yardımıyla top şeklinde parçalar çıkarın.
3.  Kavunun içini dondurma toplarıyla doldurun.
4.  Üzerine yaban mersini ve ahududuları serpiştirin.
5.  Taze nane yapraklarıyla süsledikten sonra servis yapın.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Ice Cream On Brownie Recipe

ingredients.item: Yumurta yerine chia tohumu veya öğütülmüş keten tohumu ile vegan bir bağlayıcı alternatif yapabilirsiniz.
Vanilyalı dondurma yerine çikolatalı, çilekli, fıstıklı veya meyveli dondurma çeşitleri tercih edebilirsiniz.
Vegan dondurma veya sorbe kullanmak, süt ürünü içermeyen hafif bir seçenek sunar.
çikolata sos yerine karamelli sos, frambuaz sosu veya fındık sosu kullanabilirsiniz.
üzerine kırılmış fındık, ceviz, badem veya renkli şekerlemeler ekleyerek ekstra lezzet ve dokusal çeşitlilik yaratabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Tereyağı ile çikolatayı benmari yöntemiyle eritin.
2.  Ayrı bir kapta yumurta ile şekeri iyice çırpın.
3.  Erittiğiniz çikolatalı karışıma un ve tuz ekleyerek homojen bir hamur elde edin.
4.  Hazırladığınız hamuru kare bir fırın kalıbına dökün.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında, yaklaşık 25 dakika pişirin.
6.  Fırından aldıktan sonra soğumaya bırakın ve dilimleyin.
7.  Her bir dilimin üzerine birer top dondurma yerleştirin, üzerine çikolata sos gezdirin ve servis edin.

name: Ice Cream Oreo Cookie Pie
instructions: Reserve 8 mini sandwich cookies for garnish. Place remaining cookies in a food processor or plastic bag and crush coarsely.
Stir crushed cookies into softened ice cream. Spread ice cream mixture into cookie crust and place in the freezer until set, about 1 hour.
Pipe whipped topping around the edge of pie and top with reserved cookies, standing on ends. Freeze before serving, 3 to 8 hours.

name: Ice Cream Sandwich
instructions: 1. Sandviç hamuru için gerekli malzemeleri derin bir kapta yoğurun.
2.  Hamuru streç film ile kaplayıp buzdolabında 30 dakika dinlendirin.
3.  Hamurun üzerine un serperek merdane yardımıyla yarım parmak kalınlığında açın.
4.  Kalıp yardımıyla kalp ve yuvarlak kurabiyeler kesin.
5.  Çatal yardımıyla üzerinde delikler açın.
6.  Yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 170 dereceye ayarlı fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
8.  Soğuduktan sonra iki kurabiye arasına çilekli ve antep fıstıklı dondurma paylaştırıp kapatın.
9.  Servis yapın.

name: Ice Cream Sandwich Cake
instructions: In an 8x8-inch (20x20 cm) square baking dish, place a layer of ice cream sandwiches in aluminum foil-covered dish.
Top layer of sandwiches with a layer of chocolate ice cream.
Add another layer of ice cream sandwiches, and another layer of chocolate ice cream.
Freeze for 1 hour.
Crush sandwich cookies in a resealable bag.
For the icing, combine the crushed sandwich cookies and whipped topping until well mixed.
Cover frozen cake with topping.
Garnish with more crushed sandwich cookies and serve immediately or freeze.
Enjoy!

name: Ice Cream Sandwich Dessert
instructions: Cut 1 ice cream sandwich in half. Place one whole and one half sandwich along a short side of a high-sided 9x13-inch casserole dish. Repeat until the bottom is covered, alternating whole and half sandwiches.
Spread with 1/2 of the whipped topping. Pour caramel on the top. Sprinkle with 3/4 cup peanuts. Repeat layers with remaining ice cream sandwiches, whipped topping, and peanuts. The pan will be full.
Cover and freeze for up to 2 months. Remove from the freezer 20 minutes before serving. Cut into squares.

name: Ice Cream Sandwiches
instructions: Whisk flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat butter, sugar, and corn syrup in another medium bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolk and vanilla; beat until combined.
Reduce mixer speed to low, add dry ingredients, and mix until just combined. Mix in sour cream. Form dough into a ¾”-thick square, wrap tightly in plastic, and chill until firm, 2–3 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Roll out dough between 2 sheets of parchment to about ⅛” thickness. Transfer dough (still between parchment) to a large baking sheet and chill until firm, at least 30 minutes. Remove top sheet of parchment (it will come away easily if dough is well chilled) and trim to a 14x10” rectangle. Bake cookie until dry and just set at edges, 8–10 minutes. Transfer baking sheet to a wire rack; let cookie cool.

Trim cookie to a 12x9” rectangle, then cut into twelve 3” squares. Scoop ice cream into a medium bowl and mix just until softened, 2–3 minutes. Turn 6 cookies bottom side up. Dividing evenly, scoop ice cream on top and flatten slightly; top with remaining cookies, pressing down gently. Place sandwiches on a parchment-lined baking sheet and freeze until firm, at least 4 hours. Cut sandwiches in half on a diagonal to make triangles. Wrap in parchment, if desired, and freeze until ready to serve.
DO AHEAD: Ice cream sandwiches can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

name: Ice Cream Scoop Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: Tam buğday unu (daha lifli ve besleyici)
Glutensiz un karışımları (gluten hassasiyeti olanlar için)
Hindistan cevizi yağı (hafif aroma ve sağlıklı yağ kaynağı)
Zeytinyağı (hafif farklı aroma, doku biraz değişebilir)
Hindistan cevizi şekeri (daha düşük glisemik indeks)
Akçaağaç şurubu veya bal (sıvı tatlandırıcılar, miktar ayarlanmalı)
Tarçın veya muskat rendesi (farklı aromalar için)

instructions: 1. Oda sıcaklığındaki tereyağı ve şekeri mikserle krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
2. Yumurtayı ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
3. Vanilin, kabartma tozu, tuz ve kakao tozunu ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
4. Unu yavaş yavaş ekleyerek yumuşak, ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
5. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın.
6. Dondurma kaşığı yardımıyla hamur toplarını şekillendirip, yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 12-15 dakika, kenarları hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkarıp soğumasını bekleyin ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Ice Cream Stick With 3 Ingredients
instructions: Για να φτιάξετε το παγωτό ξυλάκι frozen yogurt blueberry, χρειάζεστε θήκες ατομικού παγωτού.
Εναλλακτικά, χρησιμοποιήστε μικρά ποτήρια μιας χρήσεως με ξυλάκια για παγωτό.
Τα φρούτα που μπορείτε να προσθέσετε είναι μύρτιλα ή αλλιώς blueberry για μωβ χρώμα, φράουλες για ροζ χρώμα, βατόμουρα για κόκκινο χρώμα, μάνγκο για κίτρινο χρώμα.
Γενικά, μπορείτε να βάλετε ότι φρούτα θέλετε καθώς και κομμάτια φρούτων.
Τα φρούτα που θα χρησιμοποιήσετε μπορεί να είναι κατεψυγμένα για να παγώσουν γρήγορα τα παγωτά στις φόρμες τους.

Για πιο έντονο χρώμα στο φρουτένιο παγωτό και πιο έντονη γεύση φρούτου μπορείτε να βράσετε για λίγο τα φρούτα ώστε να συμπυκνωθεί η γεύση τους και η υφή τους να γίνει σαν αραιή μαρμελάδα. Όμως αν βιάζεστε μπορείτε να βάλετε φρέσκα φρούτα.

Για να γίνει πιο έντονη η γεύση του φρούτου στα ξυλάκιαμ πρέπει να ζεστάνουμε τα φρούτα που θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε. Έτσι και η γεύση των φρούτων θα είναι πιο έντονη αλλά και το χρώμα του παγωτού θα είναι πιο δυνατό και έντονο.
Εννοείται πως μπορείτε να βάλετε τα φρούτα χωρίς να τα ζεστάνετε, απλά να τα αλέσετε στο μπλέντερ αλλά και το χρώμα και η γεύση του φρούτου δεν θα είναι έντονα.

name: Ice Cream With Anthotyro, Honey And Pistachios
original_name: Παγωτό με ανθότυρο, μέλι και φιστίκια Αιγίνης

ingredients.item: 500 grανθότυρο σε μορφή κρέμας (στα σούπερ μάρκετ)
50 grφιστίκια αιγίνης σε ψίχα (ωμά κι ανάλατα)
500 grανθότυρο σε μορφή κρέμας (στα σούπερ μάρκετ)
50 grφιστίκια αιγίνης σε ψίχα (ωμά κι ανάλατα)

instructions: Ξεκινάμε να φτιάξουμε το παγωτό με ανθότυρο και μέλι , αφήνοντας πρώτα το ανθότυρο να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Το βάζουμε σε ένα μίξερ με κάδο και ρίχνουμε μέσα το μέλι.
Τα χτυπάμε καλά να αφρατέψουν και να ενωθούν.
Στη συνέχεια τα βάζουμε σε κατσαρόλα.
Προσθέτουμε και το γάλα και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Χαράζουμε τη βανίλια και με τη λάμα αφαιρούμε τους σπόρους της.
Τους ρίχνουμε και αυτούς στην κατσαρόλα.
Αφήνουμε το μίγμα σε χαμηλή φωτιά ανακατεύοντας τακτικά μέχρι να έρθει σε σημείο βρασμού.
Το αφήνουμε να κρυώσει.
Σουρώνουμε το μίγμα σε κόσκινο.
Το αφήνουμε στο ψυγείο μέχρι να παγώσει και το βάζουμε στην παγωτομηχανή ή, αν δεν έχουμε, στην κατάψυξη.
Μόλις παγώσει ελαφρά το χτυπάμε ανά μία ώρα στο μίξερ να αφρατέψει, δύο με τρεις φορές.
Σερβίρουμε το παγωτό με τριμμένα φιστίκια Αιγίνης.

name: Ice Cream With Cream
instructions: Ζεσταίνουμε πρώτα ελαφρά το ρούμι σε κατσαρόλα.
Βάζουμε τις σταφίδες σε μικρό μπολ και τις π εριχύνουμε με το ρούμι.
Καλύπτουμε με μεμβράνη και τις αφήνουμε για 30΄.
Τέλος τις στραγγίζουμε.
Σε κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση βάζουμε το φρέσκο γάλα, την κανέλα και τη σοκολάτα.
Αφήνουμε σε πολύ χαμηλή φωτιά, ανακατεύοντας με ξύλινη κουτάλα να λιώσει.
Αφήνουμε το μίγμα να κρυώσει 5΄ και το μεταφέρουμε σε κανάτα.
Αφαιρούμε την κανέλα.

name: Ice Cream With Cream Liqueur
instructions: Ενώνουμε πρώτα σε μπολ την κρέμα γάλακτος, το γάλα, τη ζάχαρη και το Bailey’s.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά με σπάτουλα ή κουτάλι μέχρι να λιώσουν τα υλικά (να διαλυθεί η ζάχαρη).
Μετρήστε σωστά την ποσότητα του λικέρ γιατί αν πέσει παραπάνω, το αλκοόλ δεν θα αφήσει το παγωτό να παγώσει.
Καλύπτουμε το μπολ με μεμβράνη και το βάζουμε στο ψυγείο να παγώσει καλά για 1 ώρα.
Τότε, το χτυπάμε καλά με μίξερ χειρός ν’ αφρατέψει.
Το αφήνουμε 2-3 ώρες στην κατάψυξη ν’ αρχίσει να πήζει και το ξαναχτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός ν’ αφρατέψει.
Το αφήνουμε όλη τη νύχτα για να παγώσει καλά.

name: Ice Cream With Fresh Milk
instructions: Ξεκινάμε ρίχνοντας σε κατσαρόλα το φρέσκο γάλα.
Σχίζουμε κάθετα τη βανίλια και τη ρίχνουμε στο γάλα.
Προσθέτουμε το ζαχαρούχο γάλα και το κακάο.
Ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά, να ζεσταθεί το μίγμα και να ομογενοποιηθεί.
Μόλις έρθει σε σημείο βρασμού, το αποσύρουμε.
Πιάνουμε τη βανίλια και με τη λάμα του μαχαιριού αφαιρούμε τα σποράκια της (πετάμε το μπαστουνάκι βανίλιας).
Τα ρίχνουμε στο μίγμα και ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά.
Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει καλά.
Εάν έχουμε παγωτομηχανή, το βάζουμε στον κάδο και το παγώνουμε.
Διαφορετικά, το βάζουμε σε μπολ στην κατάψυξη και το αφήνουμε λίγες ώρες μέχρι να αρχίσει να κάνει σώμα.
Τότε, το χτυπάμε με μίξερ χειρός να αφρατέψει.
Το παγώνουμε πάλι για να σταθεροποιηθεί.
Αυτή τη διαδικασία την επαναλαμβάνουμε αρκετές φορές (3-4), αν θέλουμε  να γίνει αφράτο και χωρίς κρυστάλλους.
Προς το τελευταίο χτύπημα ρίχνουμε λιωμένη κουβερτούρα (η σταγόνες σοκολάτας) λίγη λίγη και ανακατεύουμε απαλά να πάει παντού.
Έτσι, κάθε μπουκιά θα έχει τραγανά τσιπς σοκολάτας. Μπορούμε να προσθέσουμε φρούτα γλασέ, ξηρούς καρπούς ή αποξηραμένα φρούτα στο τελευταίο χτύπημα του παγωτού.

name: Ice Cream With Red Fruits
instructions: Coloque as natas numa taça e bata-as, até que fiquem bem firmes. Adicione o leite condensado e envolva.
Disponha o creme anterior numa forma de bolo inglês (15x30 cm), forrada com papel vegetal, alternando entre os frutos vermelhos e os suspiros partidos. Repita até acabar todos os ingredientes.
Deite o doce de frutos vermelhos por cima e leve ao congelador, até solidificar. Retire, desenforme e sirva.

name: Ice Cream With Saffron
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and mix in sugar, honey, and salt, then flour. Add sesame seeds.

Transfer dough to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and flatten with a spoon or offset spatula until dough is no more than ¼" thick. Bake until wafer is golden brown and smells like caramel, 9–11 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.
Do Ahead: Wafer can be made 3 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.
Place saffron in a small bowl and pour in 1 tsp. boiling water. Let sit until saffron is hydrated and releases its color, 10–12 minutes. Stir in oil.
Break wafer into large pieces. Scoop ice cream into bowls; drizzle with saffron oil and top with wafer.

name: Ice Cream With Stevia

ingredients.item: 250 grπαγωμένα κόκκινα φρούτα δάσους ή φράουλες
250 grπαγωμένα κόκκινα φρούτα δάσους ή φράουλες

instructions: Καθαρίζουμε και κόβουμε τη μπανάνα σε μικρά κομμάτια.
Στρώνουμε αντικολλητικό χαρτί σε ένα μικρό δίσκο.
Απλώνουμε τα κομμάτια μπανάνας και τα παγώνουμε στην κατάψυξη μέχρι να παγώσουν τελείως.
Βάζουμε τα παγωμένα κομμάτια μπανάνας στο μπλέντερ.
Προσθέτουμε το κακάο, το υγρό γλυκαντικό με στέβια καθώς και το φυτικό γάλα.
Χτυπάμε τα υλικά στο μπλέντερ να ομογενοποιηθούν.
Στην αρχή μοιάζει να έχει κομματάκια αλλά με το συνεχές χτύπημα για 1-2’ σχηματίζεται soft παγωτό.
Ισομοιράζουμε σε χωνάκια και το απολαμβάνουμε αμέσως.

name: Ice Pops
instructions: Dissolve flavored gelatin, unsweetened flavored drink mix powder, and sugar in boiling water. Stir in cold water and pour into popsicle molds or small plastic drinking cups. Add popsicle sticks when firm but not frozen completely; freeze until hard.

name: Ice Pops Base Formula
instructions: Combine blueberries, water, honey, and lemon juice in a blender; blend until nearly smooth, adding more water if necessary. Press through a fine-mesh sieve to remove skins and seeds.
Pour mixture into eight 3-ounce ice pop molds or paper cups; insert sticks into molds. Freeze, 8 hours to overnight.

name: Ice Water Salad

ingredients.prep: radishes, turnips, beets, and/or carrots), tough skins peeled

instructions: Thinly slice vegetables on a mandoline (they should be about the thickness of a nickel). Fill a large salad spinner (or bowl) with ice water and add vegetables; let sit at least 15 minutes or up to 6 hours. (Cover and chill if letting sit longer than 1 hour.)
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 325°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until deep golden brown, about 9 minutes. Let cool, then crush or chop to about the size of a lentil.

Smash anchovies, garlic, and a big pinch of salt in a mortar and pestle to form a smooth paste. (Alternatively, you can use the side of a chef’s knife to crush the garlic, then mash with the anchovies and salt on a cutting board.) Transfer to a small saucepan and add ⅓ cup oil. Cook over medium-low, stirring often, until garlic is just starting to turn golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool slightly. Mix in walnuts and lemon juice; taste and season with salt.

Skim off any ice cubes from water bath and drain vegetables. Cover salad spinner and spin vegetables, periodically pouring off any collected water as needed, until they are very dry. Add to bowl with dressing and toss to coat. Add half of Parmesan and toss again just to evenly distribute.
Arrange salad on a platter. Top with remaining Parmesan, drizzle with some oil, and season with pepper.

name: Ice Water Shaved Vegetable Salad

ingredients.prep: radishes, turnips, beets, and/or carrots), tough skins peeled

instructions: Thinly slice vegetables on a mandoline (they should be about the thickness of a nickel). Fill a large salad spinner (or bowl) with ice water and add vegetables; let sit at least 15 minutes or up to 6 hours. (Cover and chill if letting sit longer than 1 hour.)
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 163°C. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until deep golden brown, about 9 minutes. Let cool, then crush or chop to about the size of a lentil.

Smash anchovies, garlic, and a big pinch of salt in a mortar and pestle to form a smooth paste. (Alternatively, you can use the side of a chef’s knife to crush the garlic, then mash with the anchovies and salt on a cutting board.) Transfer to a small saucepan and add 1/3 cup oil. Cook over medium-low, stirring often, until garlic is just starting to turn golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl and let cool slightly. Mix in walnuts and lemon juice; taste and season with salt.

Skim off any ice cubes from water bath and drain vegetables. Cover salad spinner and spin vegetables, periodically pouring off any collected water as needed, until they are very dry. Add to bowl with dressing and toss to coat. Add half of Parmesan and toss again just to evenly distribute.
Arrange salad on a platter. Top with remaining Parmesan, drizzle with some oil, and season with pepper.

name: Iceberg And Cabbage Slaw

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk buttermilk, lemon juice, and mayonnaise in a large bowl, then whisk in oil. Season dressing with salt and pepper.
Add lettuce, cabbage, scallions, chives, and celery seeds to dressing and toss to coat well. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Iceberg, cabbage, scallions, and chives can be sliced 2 hours ahead. Chill in a large bowl, covered with a damp paper towel.

name: Iceberg Lettuce Salad With Radishes
instructions: Combine radish and salt in a bowl and allow to sit for 15 minutes. Add oil, vinegar, lemon juice, apple juice, and sugar; mix well. Fold in iceberg lettuce until combined.

name: Iceberg Salad With Apple And Blue Cheese
original_name: Σαλάτα Iceberg με μήλο και blue cheese
instructions: Θρυμματίζουμε το μπλε τυρί σε ένα μπολ.
Προσθέτουμε όλα τα υπόλοιπα υλικά και τα λιώνουμε με πιρούνι ή τα πολτοποιούμε στο μπλέντερ, για πιο βελούδινη υφή.
Αφήνουμε το ντρέσινγκ στο ψυγείο να παγώσει.

name: Iceberg Salad With Italian Dressing
instructions: Whisk oil, vinegar, mayonnaise, sugar, oregano, and garlic in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.

Cut lettuce in half through stem end. Tear apart into large pieces. Arrange on a platter and scatter onion, provolone, mozzarella, and peperoncini over, nestling in among leaves. Drizzle with dressing to coat to your liking (you’ll probably have some extra) and top with more black pepper.

name: Iceberg Wedges With Grilled Bacon And Croutons

ingredients.item: Finely chopped mixed fresh tender herbs (such as tarragon
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk buttermilk, sour cream, herbs, lemon juice, and garlic in a small bowl to combine; season buttermilk dressing with salt and pepper.

Prepare grill for medium heat and heat a cast-iron skillet directly on grate. Working in batches, cook bacon in skillet, turning occasionally, until browned and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to grate with tongs and grill bacon, turning once, until charred around the edges, about 1 minute. Transfer bacon to paper towels to drain.
Toss bread in same skillet until coated in bacon drippings. Transfer bread to grate and grill, turning often, until crusty and charred in spots, about 2 minutes.
Drizzle buttermilk dressing over iceberg wedges and crumble bacon over. Top with grilled croutons.

name: Iceberg With Tomatoes, Blue Cheese, And Bacon

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning halfway through, until brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes total. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Let cool; crumble.

Place half of blue cheese in a medium heatproof bowl and microwave on medium until melted, about 1 minute (this will make it easier to whisk). Add crème fraîche, mayonnaise, vinegar, lemon juice, and hot sauce to blue cheese and whisk until smooth; season dressing with salt and pepper. Cover and chill until cold, at least 30 minutes.
Place 1 slice of iceberg lettuce on each plate and spoon about ¼ cup dressing over each. Top with walnuts, bacon, celery, tomatoes, tarragon, and remaining blue cheese.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled.

name: Icebox Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı haşlanmış ve rendelenmiş patates

instructions: 1. Derin bir yoğurma kabına ılık süt, ılık su, sıvı yağ, toz şeker ve kuru mayayı alın.
2.  Malzemeleri karıştırarak mayanın aktifleşmesi için birkaç dakika bekletin.
3. Ardından unu kontrollü bir şekilde ekleyin ve yoğurmaya başlayın.
4.  Hamur toparlanmaya başladığında rendelenmiş haşlanmış patatesi ilave edin.
5.  Ele hafif yapışan, yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
6. Hamurun üzerini örtün ve yaklaşık 30 dakika kadar mayalanmaya bırakın.
7. Sürenin sonunda ellerinizi hafifçe yağlayın.
8.  Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde açın.
9.  Ortasına bir miktar rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri koyarak kapatın ve yuvarlayın.
10. Hazırladığınız poğaçaları yağlı kâğıt serili fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak dizin.
11. Tepsiyi streç filmle kapatıp 20 dakika kadar tepsi mayası yapın.
12.  Ardından üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün, susam ve çörek otu serpiştirin.
13. Önceden ısıtılmış 190°C fırında yaklaşık 30 dakika, üzerleri güzelce kızarana kadar pişirin.
14. Fırından çıkan poğaçaları birkaç dakika dinlendirin, ardından tamamen soğumalarını bekleyin.
15. Soğuyan poğaçaları buzdolabı poşetlerine yerleştirip dondurucuya kaldırın.
16.  Tüketmek istediğinizde, oda sıcaklığında çözülmesini bekleyebilir veya fırında hafifçe ısıtarak taze pişmiş gibi servis edebilirsiniz.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Iced Café De Olla

ingredients.item: Grated piloncillo or (packed) dark brown sugar

instructions: Bring piloncillo, canela, cardamom, allspice, peppercorns, salt, and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 15 minutes. Add orange zest; let cool.
Strain spiced syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring glass; discard spices. (You should have about 1 cup.)
To make 1 drink, pour 1 cup cold-brew coffee into an ice-filled glass. Stir in 2–3 Tbsp. spiced syrup; top with 2–3 Tbsp. coconut milk.
Do ahead: Syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Iced Caramel Macchiato

ingredients.item: Gevalia® cold brew concentrate - house blend

instructions: Pour vanilla syrup into a drinking glass.
Add ice cubes, then pour in milk.
Slowly pour in cold brew concentrate.
Drizzle drink with caramel sauce.

name: Iced Chai

ingredients.item: . ctc assam tea (such as wagh bakri
ingredients.prep: red label, tea india, or 24 mantra organic)

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. (or more) granulated sugar or jaggery

instructions: Coarsely crush cardamom pods with a mortar and pestle, then partially grind seeds. Transfer to a plate. Grind peppercorns with mortar and pestle until about medium-coarse; transfer to same plate.

Rinse a medium pot (about 9" diameter) with water (this helps keep the milk from scorching). Combine milk, cardamom pods and seeds, pepper, and ginger in pot and bring to a rolling boil over medium heat, scraping sides and bottom of pot occasionally with a heatproof rubber spatula. When foam starts to rise, cook 20 seconds, scraping spices from sides of pot (some plant-based milks won’t foam; simply cook 30 seconds from boiling). Reduce heat to low to allow foam to die down, then increase heat to medium-low and simmer, scraping bottom and sides of pot occasionally and adjusting heat as need to keep foam from rising, until milk is light tan in color from spices, about 2 minutes.

Stir in tea and simmer, scraping pot occasionally and adjusting heat as needed, until milk is deep tan and reduced by one third, about 4 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass, pressing on solids with spatula. (Soak pot in hot water immediately to help with cleaning.) You should have 2 cups chai concentrate; return chai to pot and simmer another minute to reduce further if needed. Add sugar and stir until dissolved.

Place ice in a large heatproof bowl with a spout or a large heatproof pitcher. Immediately pour hot chai over ice. Stir until ice is almost completely melted (larger cubes may take longer), about 2 minutes. Taste chai and add up to 2 Tbsp. cold water or 1 Tbsp. simple syrup (dissolve 2–4 tsp. sugar in 2 tsp. warm water) if needed. Serve in glasses filled with fresh ice if desired.
Do ahead: Chai can be made 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

name: Iced Chocolate Soda

ingredients.prep: such as coconut milk beverage, almond milk, or soy milk

instructions: Heat milk, cocoa powder, sugar, and vanilla in a small saucepan over medium, stirring occasionally, until mixture comes to a rapid simmer, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in chocolate until melted and smooth. Let cool slightly, about 5 minutes.

Transfer mixture to a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 20 seconds. Strain into a tall, thin glass filled with ice. Top with sparkling water, stir once, and serve.

name: Iced Coffee Shakerato

ingredients.item: Espresso or 3 ounces very strong coffee

instructions: Combine espresso, sweetened condensed milk, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold and mixture inside is very, very frothy, about 30 seconds.
Using a cocktail strainer or slotted spoon to hold back ice while allowing foam and some small ice chips to pass through, pour into an ice-filled glass.

name: Iced Horchata Coffee

ingredients.item: Gevalia® cold brew concentrate - house blend

instructions: Combine rice, water, and almonds in a blender. Blend the mixture until well combined, about 2 minutes. The mixture will be coarse.
Strain mixture through a fine sieve or cheesecloth into a pitcher; discard solids. Stir in cold brew concentrate and blue agave.
Serve over ice. Garnish with cinnamon sticks.

name: Iced Horchata Latte

ingredients.item: A spice mill or coffee grinder

instructions: Using spice mill or coffee grinder, coarsely grind rice and transfer to a 2-qt. airtight container. Coarsely grind coffee beans and place in same container as rice. Add almonds, cinnamon stick, and 4 cups water. Cover and let soak in refrigerator overnight.

Bring sugar and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, swirling pan occasionally to dissolve sugar, about 3 minutes. Transfer simple syrup to a heatproof container; cover and chill until cool, at least 30 minutes.

Transfer rice mixture to a blender and blend until very smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible. Sweeten latte to taste with simple syrup and add salt. Serve over ice.
Do Ahead: Latte can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

name: Iced Irish Coffee

ingredients.item: Freshly grated nutmeg or ground cinnamon to garnish
Freshly grated nutmeg or ground cinnamon to garnish

instructions:
For 1 serving:
Combine 1 cup freshly brewed hot coffee, ¼ cup heavy cream, and 1½ tsp. sugar (or to taste) in a mixing glass. Stir to dissolve the sugar, and chill thoroughly. Spoon 1 Tbsp. Sweetened Whipped Cream into the bottom of a 14-oz. highball glass. Stir 2 oz. Irish whiskey into coffee mixture, then pour the mixture over the whipped cream. Fill the glass with ice, then top with the remaining 1 Tbsp. Sweetened Whipped Cream. Dust with freshly grated nutmeg or ground cinnamon. Drink immediately. 

For 4 servings:
Combine 4 cups freshly brewed hot coffee, 1 cup heavy cream, and 2 Tbsp sugar (or to taste) in a pitcher. Stir to dissolve the sugar, and chill thoroughly. Spoon 1 Tbsp. Sweetened Whipped Cream into each of four 14-oz. highball glasses. Stir 8 oz. (1 cup) Irish whiskey into coffee mixture, then divide the cocktail among glasses. Fill each with ice and top with another 1 Tbsp. Sweetened Whipped Cream. Dust with freshly grated nutmeg or ground cinnamon. Serve immediately.
Do ahead: Coffee mixture can be chilled up to 8 hours ahead. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in the January 1973 issue of ‘House & Garden’ as ‘James A. Beard’s Chilled Irish Coffee.’ Head this way for more of our favorite summer cocktail ideas →

name: Iced Matcha Latte
instructions: Heat milk in a large heatproof glass measuring cup in a microwave on high until very hot but not boiling, about 45 seconds (or, heat milk in a small saucepan over medium). Using an immersion blender, carefully blend on medium speed, moving blade up and down through milk, until foamy, about 30 seconds. (Alternatively, whisk vigorously.)

Combine matcha, sugar, and ½ cup water in an ice-filled cocktail shaker. Cover and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold and latte is frothy, 30 seconds. Using a cocktail strainer or slotted spoon to hold back ice while allowing foam and small ice chips to pass through, pour into a tall, ice-filled glass. Top off with frothy milk.

name: Iced Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: Position racks in the top and bottom thirds of the oven, and preheat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 cookie sheets with silicone liners (such as Silpat®).
Whisk flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Combine butter, brown sugar, and white sugar in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer on medium-high speed, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides of the bowl, until creamy, about 2 minutes. Add eggs and vanilla and beat until blended, about 1 minutes, scraping the sides as needed. Add dry ingredients and mix on low speed just until blended. Mix in oats, raisins, and pecans on low speed just to blend.
With a 2-inch cookie scoop, scoop dough onto the prepared cookie sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
Bake in the preheated oven, rotating sheets halfway through, until cookies are light golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely, about 30 minutes.
While the cookies are cooking, whisk powdered sugar, butter, and 1 tablespoon apple juice together in a bowl until smooth. Add more juice if needed for a good drizzling consistency.
Drizzle icing over cooled cookies. Let icing set before serving, about 30 minutes.

name: Iced Pumpkin Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Combine flour, 1/4 cup plus 3 tablespoons sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and ginger in the bowl of a stand mixer. Mix using the paddle attachment. Add butter to the bowl and toss using a spatula to ensure butter is coated in flour mixture. Mix until mixture resembles cornmeal with butter pieces no bigger than a pea, about 2 minutes.
Whisk pumpkin, egg, and half-and-half together in a bowl until blended. Fold pumpkin mixture into flour mixture until dough can be formed into a ball.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface press with your hands into a long rectangle, 3/4- to 1-inch thick. Use a pizza cutter to cut dough into 4 rectangles. Cut each rectangle into 2 triangles. Place dough triangles onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until scones begin to brown around the edges and on top, about 15 minutes.
Transfer scones to a wire rack to cool completely, about 20 minutes.

Mix powdered sugar and milk together in a small bowl, using more sugar or more milk to reach the desired consistency. Use a brush to spread glaze on the cooled scones. Allow to harden, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix powdered sugar, milk, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves together in a small bowl. Drizzle spiced glaze over the first glaze and allow to harden completely, about 10 minutes more.

name: Iced Soufflés

ingredients.item: Chantili e frutos vermelhos frescos para decorar

instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Num tacho, misture os frutos vermelhos com o açúcar e leve ao lume, mexendo sempre, até engrossar. Passe a varinha mágica e desligue o lume.
Escorra as folhas de gelatina, incorpore-as muito bem no preparado anterior, transfira para uma tigela e deixe arrefecer.
À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as no preparado de frutos vermelhos. Reserve.
Corte algumas tiras de papel e disponha-as à volta de pequenas taças, conforme vê na foto, de modo a dar-lhes mais altura. Prenda com agrafos ou fita-cola.
Coloque o creme dentro de um saco de pasteleiro.
Encha as taças com o creme, até atingir o bordo das tiras de papel, e leve ao frio até solidificar. Na altura de servir, elimine o papel e decore com chantili e frutos vermelhos frescos.

name: Iced Spiced Hermits

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk together flour, cinnamon, ginger, salt, baking soda, nutmeg, baking powder, and pepper in a medium bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat brown sugar and butter until light and creamy, about 3 minutes. Beat in egg and molasses, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until incorporated, about 2 minutes. Reduce speed to low and add dry ingredients; beat until just combined. Add raisins and mix just to evenly distribute. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes and up to 12 hours.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Divide dough in half and transfer to a parchment-lined baking sheet. Using wet hands, shape dough into two 12"-long logs (a plastic bowl scraper is helpful for this) and arrange on opposing long sides of baking sheet, spacing 2"–3" from long edges. Lightly flatten top of each log.
Bake logs until edges are just set but centers are still soft, 23–26 minutes (logs will spread and crack). Let cool.

Whisk powdered sugar and milk in a small bowl until smooth. Glaze should be thick but pourable; thin with more milk if needed. Drizzle glaze erratically over logs; let sit until set, at least 30 minutes. Using a serrated knife, slice logs crosswise 1" thick (or slice 2" thick and cut in half down the center for a squarish cookie).
Do Ahead: Cookies can be assembled 4 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

name: Iced Sweet Tea

ingredients.item: Family-size or 8 regular black tea bags

instructions: Boil 3 cups of the water, then add the tea bags; continue boiling for 1 minute. Cover and set aside to steep for about 15 minutes.
Remove and discard the tea bags. Add sugar, stirring to dissolve.
Pour the tea mixture into a 1-gallon container, then add the remaining 7 cups cold water. Stir to combine.

name: Iced Tea With Hibiscus Tea Ice Cubes
instructions: Place the hibiscus flowers in a teapot. Bring 1½ cups (360 ml) of the filtered water to a boil, then remove from the heat and let cool for 5 minutes, until it reaches 82°C (82°C). Pour the water over the hibiscus and let steep for 5 minutes. Strain.
Fill an ice cube tray with the concentrated hibiscus tea and freeze until set.

Place the black tea leaves in a large spouted container. Bring the remaining 8 cups (2 L) water to a boil, then remove from the heat and let cool for 5 minutes, until it reaches 82°C (82°C). Pour the water over the tea and let steep for 5 minutes.
Fill a pitcher with the plain ice cubes. Strain the black tea through a fine-mesh sieve into the pitcher and discard the tea leaves.
Pour the tea into glasses filled partway with hibiscus ice cubes. Garnish each glass with a lemon wheel and serve.
For an Inside-Out Arnold Palmer, pour San Pellegrino Limonata over black tea ice cubes and garnish with a lemon wheel.
For a Green Tea Glee, pour Topo Chico over green tea ice cubes and garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Iced Tea With Lemon, The Refreshing Summer Drink
original_name: Té helado con limón, la bebida refrescante del verano

ingredients.item: 4 bolsas de té negro (o tu té favorito)

instructions: Hierve el agua en una olla o tetera. Una vez que esté hirviendo, retírala del fuego y agrega las bolsas de té. Deja reposar durante 5-7 minutos, dependiendo de la intensidad deseada.
Retira las bolsas de té y añade el azúcar mientras el té aún está caliente, para que se disuelva fácilmente. Revuelve bien y deja enfriar a temperatura ambiente.

Exprime el jugo de un limón grande y mézclalo con el té ya frío. Puedes ajustar la cantidad de limón según tu preferencia. Llena una jarra con hielo y vierte el té con limón sobre él. Asegúrate de tener suficiente hielo para mantener la bebida bien fría.
Sirve en vasos altos con más hielo, decorando con rodajas de limón en el borde del vaso. ¡Listo para disfrutar!

name: Iced Turmeric Latte

ingredients.item: Finely grated palm sugar or raw sugar

instructions: Whisk milk, turmeric, palm sugar, ginger, lemon juice, cardamom, and salt in a small bowl until sugar and salt have dissolved; let sit 5 minutes to let flavors meld. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring cup, pressing on solids to extract juices; discard solids.
Fill a glass with ice. Pour latte over and serve with lemon wedge.

name: Idaho Baked Potato Dip

ingredients.item: Mccormick® grill mates® montreal steak marinade

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Place potatoes in large saucepan. Cover with water. Add 1 tablespoon of the Marinade Mix to water. Bring to boil. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer 10 to 15 minutes or until potatoes are fork tender. Drain and return potatoes to saucepan. Add milk, sour cream, 1/2 cup of the cheese, 1/2 of the bacon and remaining Marinade Mix to saucepan.
Mash potatoes using a potato masher or electric mixer until potatoes are smooth and creamy. Spoon into 2-quart baking dish. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese and bacon.
Bake 15 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with green onion.

name: Idahoan Molten Lava Cakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C.
Liberally spray six 6 oz ramekins with nonstick cooking spray and place on a baking sheet.
In a double boiler, melt the chocolate and butter.
Alternative: Use a medium size stainless bowl that sits on top of a small saucepan (with water in saucepan) if you do not have a double boiler. Do not let any water get into the melting chocolate.
Remove from heat and cool.
In a large mixing bowl beat eggs with hand mixer for several minutes and thoroughly foamy.
Add sugar, dry mashed potatoes, cocoa powder, vanilla extract, espresso powder and salt. Beat a couple of minutes to mix.
Add the melted chocolate mixture and beat for five minutes. This recipe works best if lots of air is incorporated into the mixture to make the cakes light and airy.
Pour into ramekins. DO NOT under bake or over bake the cakes. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes. Keep your eye on them; you want them to be molten (a bit soft in the middle), but not too much.
Let them rest a few minutes before serving. The center may sink a little - don't worry.
Run a thin knife around the inside edge to help release the cakes.
Top with powdered sugar and whip cream.

name: If It Ain’t Broke, Don’t Fix It Stuffing

ingredients.prep: sliced 1 inch thick, torn into  0.5– 0.75-inch pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.25 teaspoons morton kosher salt
Thanksgiving stock or low-sodium chicken broth

instructions: Place racks in middle and top of oven; preheat to 300°. Butter a 3-qt. baking dish. Divide bread between 2 rimmed baking sheets and bake on middle rack, tossing occasionally, until dried out (do not let brown more than just a bit around the edges), 25–35 minutes. Let cool.

Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Arrange sausage in a single layer and cook, undisturbed, until browned underneath, about 3 minutes. Break up into bite-size pieces with 2 spatulas or spoons and continue to cook, tossing occasionally, until cooked through, about 5 minutes longer. Transfer sausage to a plate.

Reduce heat to medium and melt 1 cup butter in same skillet. Add onion, fennel, and celery; season lightly with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are very tender but not browned, 12–15 minutes. Add wine and scrape bottom of skillet to release any browned bits. Bring to a boil and cook until wine is evaporated, about 3 minutes. Toss in parsley, sage, and thyme and let mixture cool in skillet.

Increase oven temperature to 350°. Whisk eggs and 2 cups stock in a very large bowl. Add bread, sausage, and onion mixture and toss well to combine. Add 2 tsp. or 1¼ tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pepper. Drizzle remaining 2 cups stock over and toss again to combine. Let sit, tossing occasionally, until bread absorbs all of the liquid, about 10 minutes.

Transfer stuffing to prepared dish; butter a sheet of foil and cover dish, butter side down. Bake on middle rack until very hot throughout (it should feel too hot to comfortably touch in the center; an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should register 160°), 35–40 minutes.

Increase oven temperature to 425°. Remove foil and transfer baking dish to top rack. Continue to bake stuffing until golden brown, 25–30 minutes longer.
Do Ahead: Stuffing can be assembled 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.


Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best Thanksgiving stuffing recipes →

name: Iftar Mousse
instructions: 1. Avokadoları ve muzları soyarak dilimleyin.
2.  Hepsini birlikte, keçiboynuzu ununu da ilave ederek blender’dan geçirin.
3.  Vanilya, portakal suyu, süt ve hurmayı da ilave edin.
4.  Yumuşak, akışkan bir kıvam alıncaya kadar blender’dan geçirin.
5. Musları küçük kaselere alarak rende çikolata, fındık ve Antep fıstıklarını tuzla karıştırıp üzerine serpin.
6.  Buzdolabında soğuyana kadar beklettikten sonra servis yapın.

name: Iftar Pita With Olives And Rosemary
instructions: 1. Unu geniş bir kaba alın.
2.  Ortasını çukurlaştırıp maya, tuz, toz şeker ve sızma zeytinyağını ilave edin.
3.  Yavaşça suyu ilave edip pürüzsüz kıvamlı bir hamur elde edinceye kadar yoğurun.
4.  Hamurun üzerini nemli bir bezle örtüp 40 dakika dinlendirin.
5.  Mayalanan hamuru iki eşit bezeye ayırın ve unlanmış tezgah üzerine alarak 7-8 mm inceliğinde açın.
6.  Açtığınız hamurları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine alın.
7.  Parmak uçlarınızla üzerlerine bastırıp çukurlar oluşturup bir fırça yardımıyla sızma zeytinyağı sürün.
8.  Taze biberiye ve dilimlenmiş zeytinleri ilave edin.
9.  Deniz tuzu serpip önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
10.  Ilık servis yapın.

name: Iftar Plate Recipe

ingredients.item: Beyaz peynir veya kaşar peyniri dilimleri
İnce dilimlenmiş pastırma veya füme hindi (isteğe bağlı)
Küçük bir kase yoğurt veya cacık (isteğe bağlı)

instructions: 1. Geniş bir servis tabağı seçin ve ortasına hurmaları yerleştirin.
2. Peynir çeşitlerini dilimleyip tabağın farklı noktalarına dengeli şekilde dağıtın.
3. Domates ve salatalıkları doğrayarak tabağa ekleyin.
4. Zeytinleri küçük kaselerde ya da doğrudan tabağa yerleştirin.
5. Kuru meyveler ve kuruyemişleri boşluklara ekleyerek tabağı zenginleştirin.
6. İsteğe bağlı olarak bal ve tereyağını küçük kaplarda servis tabağına ekleyin.
7. Tabağı fazla doldurmamaya özen gösterin; sade ve düzenli bir yerleşim daha iştah açıcı görünür.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Imam Baildi
instructions: Πλένουμε τις μελιτζάνες και αφαιρούμε από μπροστά μία μικρή φέτα.
Κρατάμε το τρυφερό κοτσάνι γιατί θα συγκρατεί τη μελιτζάνα και το σχήμα της.
Με μαχαίρι τις ξεφλουδίζουμε κατά μήκος ριγωτά (ρίγα άσπρη-ρίγα μοβ).
Κάνουμε θήκη για τη γέμιση χαράσσοντας κατά μήκος τις μελιτζάνες και ανοίγουμε τη μέση (όχι τις άκρες) σαν βαρκούλα.
Σε μία λεκάνη γεμάτη νερό ρίχνουμε 1 κ.σ. αλάτι και βυθίζουμε μέσα τις μελιτζάνες. Τις αφήνουμε να σταθούν 30 λεπτά, να μαλακώσουν και να ανοίξουν στη σχισμή που κάναμε.

name: Imam Bayıldı Recipe

ingredients.item: Yarım demet maydanoz (ince doğranmış, servis için)
Klasik tarif patlıcanla yapılır ama kabak veya dolmalık biber ile farklı bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Küçük boy patlıcanlar kullanmak, pişirme süresini kısaltır ve sunumu şık gösterir.
Soğan yerine pırasa veya yeşil soğan kullanabilirsiniz.
Sarımsağı daha hafif aromalı seviyorsanız miktarını azaltabilirsiniz.
Taze domates yerine konserve domates veya domates püresi kullanabilirsiniz.
Salça yerine daha yoğun bir tat için biber salçası ekleyebilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı yerine az miktarda ayçiçek yağı veya yarı zeytinyağı – yarı tereyağı karışımı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir versiyon için yağı minimumda tutabilirsiniz.
Tuz ve karabiberin yanı sıra pul biber, kekik veya fesleğen ile farklı aromalar ekleyebilirsiniz.
Servis sırasında üzerine taze maydanoz veya dereotu eklemek aromayı ve görselliği artırır.

instructions: 1. Patlıcanları alacalı soyun, ortadan ikiye bölün ve tuzlu suda 15–20 dakika bekletin.
2.  Ardından kurulayın.
3. Tavada veya fırında az yağ ile hafifçe kızartın ve yağını süzdürün.
4. Zeytinyağında soğan ve sarımsağı kavurun.
5.  Domates, salça, toz şeker, tuz ve karabiber ekleyip 5–7 dakika pişirin.
6. Patlıcanları fırın kabına yerleştirin ve hazırladığınız harcı her bir patlıcanın içine doldurun.
7. Patlıcanların üzerine yarım çay bardağı su gezdirin.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 25–30 dakika pişirin.
9. Fırından çıkarıp üzerine ince doğranmış maydanoz serpiştirerek oda sıcaklığında veya hafif soğuk olarak servis edin.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Imam Fainted
instructions: 1. Patlıcanların sap kısımlarını kesmeden alacalı soyun.
2.  Acısını almak için tuzlu suda 10 dakika bekletin.
3.  Süzüp kağıt havlu ile kurulayın.
4. Soğanları soyup piyazlık doğrayın.
5.  Sarımsakları ayıklayın.
6.  Domatesleri soyup küp doğrayın.
7.  Biberleri temizleyip ortadan ikiye kesin ve ince doğrayın.
8. Zeytinyağını tavada ısıtın.
9.  Soğan ve tuzu ilave edip soteleyin.
10.  Sarımsak, domates, biber, şeker ve karabiberi ekleyin.
11.  Kısık ateşte 10 dakika pişirin.
12. Ayçiçeği yağını bir tavada ısıtın.
13.  Isınan yağda patlıcanları iki taraflı hafif kızartın.
14.  Kızaran patlıcanları kağıt havlu üzerine alıp fazla yağını çektirin.
15. Patlıcanları yayvan bir tencereye aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
16.  Orta kısımlarını bıçakla hafif kesip açın ve soğanlı harcı paylaştırın.
17. Tencerenin kenarından 2 su bardağı sıcak su ekleyin.
18.  Kapağını kapatıp kısık ateşte 20 dakika suyunu çekene kadar pişirin.
19. Domates sosu hazırlamak için zeytinyağını tavada ısıtın.
20.  Rendelenmiş domatesi ve salçayı ekleyip bir taşım kaynatın.
21. Sosu bir servis tabağına alın.
22.  Üzerine patlıcanları yerleştirip ince kıyılmış maydanoz serpin.
23.  Soğuk servis yapın.
24.  Afiyet olsun.

name: Imam Turban
instructions: 1. Keki için yumurtaların sarısını ve beyazını ayırın.
2.  Sarısının içine toz şekeri ilave edip 5 dakika çırpın.
3.  Yumurta aklarına bir tutam tuz atıp kar gibi olana kadar çırpın.
4.  Sarıların içine ılık su ilave edip tekrar çırpın.
5.  Kakao, un ve kabartma tozunu ekleyin.
6.  Yumurta aklarını söndürmeden karışıma ekleyip tahta kaşık ile karıştırın.
7.  Karışımı yağlı kağıt serili dikdörtgen cam bir fırın kalıbına döküp önceden ısıtılmış 175 derece fırında 30-35 dakika pişirin.
8.  Kreması için süt, toz şeker ve unu bir tencereye alarak muhallebi kıvamında pişirin.
9.  Ocaktan almadan önce tereyağını ekleyin.
10.  Vanilya ve toz krem şantiyi ilave edip mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
11.  Kekiniz soğuduktan sonra yuvarlak bir kurabiye kalıbıyla kekten parçalar kesin.
12.  Bir parçanın üzerine krema koyup başka bir parçayla üzerini kapatın.
13.  Kenarlarına da krema sürüp Hindistan cevizine bulayın.
14.  Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
15.  Tatlının üzerine döküp servis yapın.

name: Imitation Crab Salad
instructions: Place eggs in a saucepan and cover with cold water. Bring water to a boil. Cover, remove from heat, and let eggs stand in hot water for 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from hot water, cool, peel and chop.
Trim crust from bread and dice into cubes. Discard crusts or reserve for another use.
Combine bread cubes, eggs, imitation crab meat, celery, onion, mayonnaise, sour cream, salt, and pepper in a large bowl; mix well and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Imperial Punch Royale

ingredients.item: Block of ice with orange slices and lime slices
Chilled prosecco or other sparkling wine

instructions: Place pineapple pieces in large bowl. Pour brandy over; cover and let pineapple soak at room temperature at least 10 hours or overnight.

Place sugar in medium metal bowl. Using vegetable peeler, remove peel from oranges in strips (orange part only). Add orange peel to sugar and mash with muddler or handle of wooden spoon until sugar is soft and moist and turns light orange color, about 3 minutes. Add 1/2 cup boiling water and stir until sugar dissolves. Strain mixture, reserving orange syrup. Discard orange peel.

Strain pineapple mixture into large bowl, reserving brandy. Discard pineapple. Add 1/4 cup reserved orange syrup, lime juice, Port, and maraschino liqueur to brandy. Cover and chill at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Just before serving, transfer punch mixture to punch bowl; add block of ice to bowl. Stir in Prosecco. Add 1 cup (or more) sparkling water, if desired, and serve.

name: Impossible Baked Chimichangas
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Cook and stir Impossible Burger in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until browned and crumbly, 5 to 6 minutes.
Mix crumbles, refried beans, cheese, salsa, chili powder, cumin, and oregano together until combined.
Lay tortillas on a flat work surface and place about 1/3 cup of filling in the center of each tortilla.
Fold tortilla sides up over filling and roll up like burritos.
Place chimichangas on a foil-lined baking sheet and brush with oil.
Bake until golden and crisp, about 20 minutes.

name: Impossible Burger Party Roll-ups

ingredients.item: Meatless ground beef substitute (such as impossible(tm) foods)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 10-inch pie dish with cooking spray.

Heat oil in a pan over medium heat; add meatless ground beef. Break up and cook through until browned and crumbly. Shake onion soup pouch, mixing up contents well. Using a spoon, scoop up half of the soup mix and incorporate into the pan. Add more to taste; discard remaining mix or reserve for another use. Stir in water.
Remove from heat and fold in Cheddar cheese. The cheese should not be entirely melted, just evenly distributed through the mixture.

Divide meatless mixture into 8 equal portions. Unroll crescent roll dough on a work surface, working on one at a time. Press dough with your fingers to flatten and slightly enlarge the space, making sure the widest area is facing you. Mound one portion of meatless beef mixture on the wide area and gently roll up to the tip. Tuck the edges of the roll up around the side of the bundle. Place in the pie plate. Repeat.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 15 minutes.

name: Impossible Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt), then lightly dust with flour; tap to remove excess.
Fill a shallow baking pan with enough water to come 1/3 up the sides of the tube pan. Place water bath in the oven to warm up while it is preheating.
Pour cajeta caramel sauce into a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave until warm and pourable, about 1 minute. Pour into the prepared tube pan, completely covering the bottom.
Whisk flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and baking powder together in a bowl.

Beat 10 ½ tablespoons butter in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Add sugar; beat until light and fluffy. Beat in 1 egg and coffee. Add flour mixture, alternating with milk, mixing well after each addition. Pour batter over caramel in tube pan.
Combine evaporated milk, sweetened condensed milk, 4 eggs, and vanilla extract in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until smooth. Pour over cake batter through a fine-mesh sieve.
Bake in the water bath in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, about 1 hour.

Cool on a wire rack for about 1 hour. Carefully run a thin knife around the edges to loosen, tap pan firmly a few times then shake gently. Place a serving plate over the pan and invert to release cake onto the plate.

name: Impossible Coconut Pie
instructions: Combine milk, sugar, baking mix, butter, eggs, and vanilla in blender; blend on low speed for 3 minutes.
Pour into the prepared pie plate and let stand for 5 minutes. Sprinkle coconut over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes. Let pie cool briefly before slicing; serve warm.

name: Impossible Stuffed Zucchini
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Cut ends from zucchini; halve zucchini lengthwise. Scrape and hollow out seedy flesh, leaving about ½ inch flesh on bottom and sides of zucchini. Discard scraped-out flesh. Place zucchini into a 10x15-inch baking dish.
Combine meatless ground beef, tomato, bread crumbs, Pecorino-Romano, egg, parsley, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl using clean or gloved hands.
Stuff hollowed-out zucchini with meatless ground beef mixture; sprinkle with mozzarella.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and zucchini are tender, 35 to 40 minutes.

name: Impossibly Breakfast Bake (crowd Size)
instructions: Cook sausage, bell pepper, and onion in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sausage is no longer pink; drain and transfer to the baking dish.
Stir in potatoes, and 1 1/2 cups cheese until well combined.
Stir milk, Bisquick, eggs, and pepper together in a bowl until well combined. Pour into baking dish.
Bake, uncovered, until a knife inserted in center comes out clean, 40 to 45 minutes.
Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese. Continue to bake until cheese melts, 1 to 2 minutes more. Cool 5 minutes.

name: Ina Garten’s Chocolate Pecan Scones

ingredients.item: Extra-large egg beaten with 2 tbsp. water or cream

instructions: Arrange racks in top and bottom third of oven; preheat to 400°.  Line 2 sheet pans with parchment paper.
Combine chocolate, pecans, and 3 Tbsp. flour in a small bowl.

Using a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, beat baking powder, salt, 2 Tbsp. sugar, and 4 cups flour on low speed to combine. Add butter and, with mixer still on low speed, beat until pea-sized pieces of butter remain.

Pour cream into a glass measuring cup, add eggs, and whisk until combined. With mixer still on low speed, pour cream mixture into butter mixture and beat just until blended. Add chocolate mixture and beat just until combined (the dough will be very sticky).

Turn out dough onto a well-floured work surface and knead a few times, dusting with flour so dough doesn't stick to surface, until chocolate and pecans are well distributed. Flour your hands and a rolling pin and roll dough ¾"–1" thick. You should see lumps of butter in the dough. Cut dough with 3" cutter. Place rounds on prepared pans. Reroll scraps, cut out more rounds, and place on prepared pans. Brush tops with egg wash and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake scones, rotating pans top to bottom halfway through, until tops are lightly browned and insides are fully baked, about 20 minutes. Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Ina Garten’s Parsnip Purée
instructions: Place 1½ lb. parsnips, scrubbed, sliced ¾" thick, in a medium pot, add 1 Tbsp. kosher salt, and add enough water to cover the parsnips. Cover the pot, bring to a boil, then uncover, lower the heat, and simmer for 15–20 minutes, until the parsnips are very soft when tested with a small knife. Don’t drain the pot!

With a slotted spoon or small strainer, transfer the parsnips to the bowl of a food processor fitted with the steel blade and pulse to chop the parsnips. Pour the cooking liquid into a glass measuring cup and pour ½ cup down the feed tube. Purée the parsnips, adding more cooking liquid (about 1 cup total) through the feed tube until the parsnips are creamy and almost smooth but still have some texture. Add 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, diced, and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper and purée until combined. Taste for seasonings and serve hot.

name: Ina Garten’s Raspberry Baked Alaska
instructions: Bring raspberries, sugar, and ¼ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer 4 minutes. Transfer raspberry mixture to a food processor fitted with the steel blade. Add jam and liqueur and process until smooth. Transfer to an airtight container and chill.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

Slice cake into six ½"-thick slices. Cut out six 2½"-diameter circles—one from each slice—with an unfluted round cookie cutter; discard scraps. (You can also use a small knife.) Place rounds 2" apart on a flat dish that will fit in your freezer.

Soften sorbet and ice cream just enough to be able to scoop them with a standard 2¼"-diameter ice cream scoop (15–30 seconds in the microwave works). Fill half the scoop with sorbet and the rest of the scoop with ice cream. Arrange scoop of sorbet/ice cream flat side down in the center of each round. Freeze until ice cream is very hard, at least 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, preheat oven to 500°. Heat egg whites and sugar in a medium heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water, whisking constantly, until a candy thermometer registers 120° and sugar is dissolved. Pour mixture into a large bowl. Add vanilla, cream of tartar, and salt. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat 1 minute, then increase speed to high and beat until egg whites form stiff, glossy peaks, about 5 minutes.

Transfer rounds to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Working quickly, spread meringue with a spoon or small spatula over rounds and sorbet/ice cream, making lots of peaks all over with the back of the spoon. (You can also use a pastry bag fitted with a large fluted tip and pipe meringue thickly around each ball of ice cream and cake.) Be sure all of the sorbet/ice cream is covered with meringue. Bake, rotating pan once halfway through, until edges of meringues are browned, 2½–3 minutes. Divide among plates, drizzle fresh raspberry sauce around meringues, and serve immediately.
Do Ahead: Baked Alaskas can be assembled 3 days ahead. Keep frozen—but don’t cover them, because the meringue won’t freeze hard and you’ll ruin the piping. Bake before serving.

name: Incassiye
instructions: 1. Piyazlık doğranmış soğanlarla etleri orta boy bir tencerede yağ ile birlikte kavurun.
2.  Soğan yumuşadıktan sonra ayrı bir kapta suda bekletilmiş erik kuruları, haşlanmış nohut ve biber salçasını ilave edip karıştırın.
3.  Yarım su bardağı su ekleyip kaynamaya bırakın.
4.  Kaynayınca pekmez ilave edip karıştırın ve dinlenmeye bırakın.
5.  Servis yapın.

name: Incredibly Good Cheese Pizza

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Crushed red pepper flakes; plus more for serving

instructions: Mix one ¼-oz. envelope instant yeast (about 2¼ tsp.), 2¼ cups (281 g) bread flour, 2¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1½ tsp. sugar, and 1 cup warm water in a large bowl just until flour is hydrated and a very shaggy dough forms, about 1 minute. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit at room temperature 20 minutes.

Set a small bowl of room-temperature water on work surface for easy reaching. Uncover dough and, using a damp hand, stretch one side of dough up and over to meet the opposite side; turn bowl 90°. Repeat 3 more times, turning bowl after each. (This constitutes 1 full fold. If dough doesn’t always stretch to meet opposite side, just aim for the middle.) Wet your hands and shake off excess any time the dough begins to feel sticky. Cover dough and let sit 30 minutes (set a timer), then repeat folding process to make 1 full fold. Repeat resting and folding process 3 more times (if you lose count halfway through, just fold one more time and proceed). By the end of the fourth fold, the dough should be significantly smoother and tighter.

Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and divide into 2 equal pieces with a knife or bench scraper. Using floured hands, shape each portion into a rough ball. Transfer each to a bowl (you can use the unwashed bowl the dough proofed in for 1 portion) and tightly cover with plastic wrap. If using directly, let rise at room temperature until puffy but not necessarily doubled in size, 30–45 minutes. If using later, let rise in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour and up to 1 day.

Bring 3 garlic cloves, finely grated, one 14-oz. can crushed tomatoes, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. sugar, and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally; cook until flavors have come together (tomatoes should no longer taste raw), 6–8 minutes. Taste sauce and season with more salt if needed. Remove from heat and set aside (you should have about 1¼ cups).

Place a rack 6" from heating element (typically the second highest position in oven) and heat broiler. Working with 1 ball at a time, transfer dough to a surface lightly dusted with bread flour and generously dust top with more flour. Stretch dough into a 9"–10" round, leaving it about 1" thicker around the perimeter for the crust. (If dough is not stretching easily, let sit at room temperature 5 minutes before trying again.)

Heat a dry large stainless-steel skillet over medium. Pour in 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil and swirl to coat bottom of pan. Carefully transfer a dough round to pan and immediately cover with a lid. (If you don’t have a lid that fits; use a baking sheet.) Cook until puffy and no longer wet looking, 5–7 minutes. Uncover and continue to cook until deep golden brown and charred in spots underneath, about 3 minutes more. (If center puffs as it cooks, press down with a spatula.) Transfer crust to an oven-safe wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Wipe pan out with a paper towel to remove any burnt flour and add 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil. Repeat cooking process with remaining dough round; transfer to a large plate.

Spread a thin layer of sauce over crust on rack (⅓–½ cup), leaving a 1" border around the perimeter. Top sauce with 5 oz. low-moisture mozzarella, coarsely grated (about 1 cup). Broil, rotating pizza as needed to promote even browning, until crust is blistered and blackened in spots and cheese is melted and browned, about 3 minutes (keep a close eye on your pizza as it will go from pale to blackened very quickly). Let pizza cool 5 minutes on rack, then transfer to another large plate. Top with basil leaves and more red pepper flakes and drizzle with more oil if desired. Transfer remaining crust to wire rack and repeat process with remaining sauce (you may have some sauce left over; just save it for serving with your pizza for dipping your crust into), remaining 5 oz. low-moisture mozzarella, coarsely grated (about 1 cup), and more basil, red pepper flakes, and oil if desired to make another pizza.

name: Incredibly Hearty Vegan Tortilla Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine rice, 1 tablespoon vegetable oil, 1 tablespoon cumin, 1 tablespoon paprika, garlic powder, chili powder, oregano, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and crushed red pepper in a saucepan over medium heat. Toast rice until lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Add water and bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer until rice is cooked through according to package directions, 45 to 50 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining tablespoon of oil in a large stockpot over medium heat and cook onions, celery, bell pepper, and garlic until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add frozen corn and saute until hot, 3 to 5 minutes. Add pinto, black, and kidney beans, tomatoes with their juices, coriander, remaining 1 tablespoon cumin, remaining 1 tablespoon paprika, and season with salt and pepper. Cook for about 5 minutes. Pour in vegetable broth and add tortilla strips. Once rice is cooked, add it to the soup.
Cook tortilla soup over medium heat until tortillas begin to break down and thicken the broth, about 30 minutes. Add lime zest and juice and cook for 5 minutes more.
Serve hot and garnish with coarsely crumbled tortilla chips.

name: Incredibly Moist Pumpkin Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour three 9x5-inch loaf pans.
Mix pumpkin, oil, sugar, and eggs together in a large bowl.
Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in a separate bowl; stir into pumpkin mixture until well blended.
Divide batter evenly between the prepared pans.
Bake in preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of each loaf comes out clean, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Indian Chaat-inspired Potato Chip Salad
instructions: Combine yogurt, lime juice, tamarind paste, garam masala, cumin, hot sauce, and sugar in a bowl with a whisk until combined. Taste and adjust as needed; mix in water as needed to reach desired consistency.

Layer chips, jalapeno, bell pepper, red and green onions, potatoes, mint, cilantro, and yogurt sauce as desired for individual portions, or this can be served salad bar-style and everyone can make their own plate.
Squeeze lime juice from halves over top and enjoy!

name: Indian Chicken 65

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Mix chicken, curry leaves, yogurt, garlic paste, chili powder, coriander, garam masala, and ginger together. Cover and let marinate in a refrigerator for 2 hours.
Add a few drops of red food coloring and mix so that chicken becomes tinted with red.

Heat 2 inches oil in a deep saucepan over medium heat. Lower chicken pieces carefully into the hot oil, working in batches, and fry, stirring frequently, until browned and no longer pink in the centers, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining chicken pieces.

name: Indian Curried Chicken Thighs
instructions: Season cubed chicken with salt and pepper and set aside.

Preheat a large dry skillet over medium heat. Add curry powder and toast until lightly browned and fragrant, stirring constantly, 2 to 3 minutes. Add paprika, cinnamon, ginger, and turmeric and roast, stirring constantly, for 1 to 2 minutes. Stir in onion, garlic, and bay leaf. Pour in olive oil and mix to combine.
